figures.note: Facing these realities, our project proposes concrete solutions to transform these challenges into opportunities and build a Cameroon that prospers for all.

aboutPreview.title: A movement born from conviction
aboutPreview.body: Parti Jouvence is a Cameroonian political party founded on the conviction that political renewal comes through youth. We carry a vision of hope, integrity and progress for our nation.

cta.title: Ready to be part of the
cta.body: Your voice matters. Join thousands of Cameroonians who are building the future of our nation together.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A political movement born from the conviction that Cameroon deserves renewal, led by youth and guided by integrity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.p1: Make Cameroon a united, disciplined and prosperous Nation for all of its children. We aim to fully reclaim our sovereignty, protect the country's integrity, restore order and cohesion, and reach effective Emergence by 2035 through a performing, social, participatory and solidarity-based economy.
vision.p2: We believe in a transparent political system, an innovative economy, and a governance that places the collective interest above private ones.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Deeply reform institutions for an effective democracy
Gradually exit the CFA Franc Zone and build a sovereign economy
Resolve the Anglophone crisis through inclusive dialogue
Guarantee universal access to education, health, water and electricity
Build a full-employment system and value work and merit
Promote research and scientific and technological innovation

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: We act with transparency and honesty, placing national interest above everything.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: We promote creative and modern solutions to Cameroon's challenges.

items.title: Inclusion
items.desc: We value the participation of everyone, regardless of background, gender or religion.

items.title: Responsibility
items.desc: We honour our commitments and remain accountable to citizens.

items.title: Excellence
items.desc: We aim for excellence in everything we do to serve the people.

items.title: Solidarity
items.desc: We believe in mutual support to build a strong society.

leader.bio1: Dr. Valère Bertrand BESSALA is a visionary leader committed to the democratic renewal and development of Cameroon. He carries the political project "LE PROJET" of Parti JOUVENCE–JCP, candidate for the October 2025 presidential election in Cameroon.
leader.bio2: Parti JOUVENCE–JCP has been legally registered since April 22, 2019. Our headquarters are in Obili, Yaoundé. Dr. BESSALA has devoted his life to good governance, transparency, and Cameroonian youth empowerment.
leader.quote: The change we want to see in Cameroon will not come from outside. It will come from us — from our commitment, our determination to build together a country where everyone can fulfill their dreams.

program.title: An
program.subtitle: Discover our detailed vision to build a united, disciplined and prosperous Cameroon. 5 strategic pillars, 33 chapters of concrete action for Emergence in 2035.

actions: Full audit of public finances and state-owned enterprises
Launch of the citizen transparency platform
Creation of the Young Entrepreneurs Support Fund
Start of education reform and school construction
Progressive rollout of universal health insurance
Broadband coverage on 80% of the territory
Creation of 100,000 jobs in priority sectors
A performing, competitive Cameroonian economy in Africa
Universal access to drinking water and electricity

cta.title: This Program Is
cta.body: We remain open to your suggestions and ideas to enrich our shared vision of tomorrow's Cameroon.

getInvolved.joinTitle: Become a Member of Parti Jouvence
getInvolved.joinSubtitle: Fill out this form to become an official member

form.terms: I agree to Parti Jouvence's statutes and rules and commit to respecting the party's values.

getInvolved.donateSubtitle: Operation 500/FAP CENT for 77 million (87 million = candidacy file for 300 signatures + 30 million = deposit)

transparency.title: Transparency and Receipts
transparency.body: All contributions are recorded and used transparently to finance the 300 signatures and the campaign deposit. A receipt will be sent to you.

contact.subtitle: We're listening. Don't hesitate to reach out with any question or to join our movement.
contact.formSubtitle: We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.infoSubtitle: Find us through our different channels.
